sections.paragraph:
τελώνιον, ου, τό revenue/tax office (s. τελώνης; Posidippus Com. [III b.c.], Fgm. 13; Strabo 16, 1, 27 [prob. ‘toll-collection operation’]; 17, 1, 16 [‘toll-office’], difft. L-S-J-M; OGI 496, 9; 525, 10; UPZ 112 VIII, 3 [203/202 b.c.]; Mitt-Wilck. I/2, 223, 3) Mt 9:9; Mk 2:14; Lk 5:27; GEb 34, 61 (PPetr II, 11 [2], 3 ἐπὶ τελώνιον).—M-M.

Posidippus Com Posidippus Com , s. Com.; III b.c.—List 5

Fgm. Fgm. = fragment, fragmentary

Strabo Strabo , I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

prob. prob. = probable, probably

difft. difft. = different(ly)

L-S-J-M L-S-J-M = (L-S-J) HLiddell/RScott, A Greek-English Lexicon; New Edition by HSJones/RMcKenzie—List 6

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

UPZ UPZ = Urkunden der Ptolemäerzeit—Lists 4, 6

Mitt-Wilck. Mitt-Wilck. = LMitteis/UWilcken, Grundzüge und Chrestomathie der Papyruskunde—Lists 4, 6

GEb GEb = Gospel of the Ebionites—List 1

PPetr PPetr = The Flinders Petrie Papyri—List 4

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 999
